# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vmNamePrefix": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "webapp"
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString"
    },
    "vnetName": {
      "type": "string"
    },
    "subnetName": {
      "type": "string"
    }
  },
  "variables": {
    "osDiskType": "Standard_LRS",
    "dataDiskSizeGB": 50,
    "imageReference": {
      "publisher": "Canonical",
      "offer": "UbuntuServer",
      "sku": "18.04-LTS",
      "version": "latest"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nic')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "ipconfig1",
            "subnet": {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets', parameters('vnetName'), parameters('subnetName'))]"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    },
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-01",
      "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-vm')]",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nic'))]"
      ],
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "Standard_DS1_v2"
        },
        "storageProfile": {
          "imageReference": "[variables('imageReference')]",
          "osDisk": {
            "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-osdisk')]",
            "caching": "ReadWrite",
            "createOption": "FromImage",
            "managedDisk": {
              "storageAccountType": variables('osDiskType')
            }
          },
          "dataDisks": [
            {
              "name": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-datadisk1')]",
              "diskSizeGB": variables('dataDiskSizeGB'),
              "caching": "ReadWrite",
              "createOption": "Empty"
            }
          ]
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-vm')]",
          "adminUsername": parameters('adminUsername'),
          "adminPassword": parameters('adminPassword')
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', concat(parameters('vmNamePrefix'), '-nic'))]",
              "primary": true
            }
          ]
        },
        "diagnosticsProfile": {
          "bootDiagnostics": {
            "enabled": true,
            "storageUri": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts', parameters('storageAccountName')), '2019-06-01').PRIMARYENDPOINT]"
          }
        }
      }
    }
  ]
}
